name: Palma Arched Fluted Cabinet Dark Brown - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Keep the small items organized out of sight with the Palma Arched Fluted Cabinet from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This dark brown cabinet features an arched bottom with a fluted design at the front for a standout look. Designed with a wooden frame, this fluted cabinet has two knobs for easy opening and closing of the doors.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
